hero.alt: A beautiful portrait of a Green Iguana in the wild
hero.caption: The Green Iguana is a highly adapted species with unique behaviors.

habitat.alt: A Green Iguana navigating its natural environment
habitat.caption: They make their home in diverse habitats where they can find shelter and thrive.

diet.alt: A Green Iguana finding or consuming food
diet.caption: Finding food is a major part of the daily routine for a Green Iguana.

baby.alt: A young or baby Green Iguana showing early development
baby.caption: Baby Green Iguanas must learn to survive and adapt from a young age.

family.alt: A group of Green Iguanas interacting with each other
family.caption: While often solitary, some Green Iguanas interact with others of their species.

range.alt: A Green Iguana traveling across its geographic range
range.caption: Their geographic range covers various regions suited to their survival.
